payload.label: table
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark-stained wood island-style table with a light beige, patterned granite or stone countertop; the rectangular tabletop and front two-panel wooden base are visible while the right side is cropped by the image edge. A small decorative centerpiece sits on the top and there are minor scuffs along the base; an electrical outlet/sticker is visible on the right side. Approximate distance from camera ~1.2 meters.
